message:
fix(benchmarks): make benchmarks HONEST

CRITICAL FIXES:

1. bench_compiled_logic_table.zig - NOW READS REAL DATA
   - Previously used FAKE random data while DuckDB/Polars read real data
   - Now uses Table.readFloat64Column() to read real 'amount' column
   - Still uses VectorOps_dot_product extern (real compiled @logic_table)

2. All other benchmarks - HONEST LABELS
   - Changed "@logic_table" to "LanceQL native" for hand-written Zig code
   - These benchmarks DON'T use compiled @logic_table extern functions
   - They use hand-written Zig loops, not compiled Python

Only bench_compiled_logic_table.zig actually uses @logic_table:
   extern fn VectorOps_dot_product(a: [*]const f64, b: [*]const f64, len: usize) f64;

All other benchmarks honestly label themselves as "LanceQL native".
